error.message: The view 'InstanceLogo' or its master was not found or no view engine supports the searched locations. The following locations were searched: ~/Views/Admin/InstanceLogo.aspx ~/Views/Admin/InstanceLogo.ascx ~/Views/Shared/InstanceLogo.aspx ~/Views/Shared/InstanceLogo.ascx ~/Views/Admin/InstanceLogo.cshtml ~/Views/Admin/InstanceLogo.vbhtml ~/Views/Shared/InstanceLogo.cshtml ~/Views/Shared/InstanceLogo.vbhtml
